data.title: Why WaFd Shares Are Trading Higher By 6%; Here Are 20 Stocks Moving Premarket
Apple, SMCI, Nvidia, AMD And Other Tech Stocks Climb In Monday Pre-Market: What's Going On?
data.description: The shares of Apple Inc. (NASDAQ: AAPL), Super Micro Computer Inc. (NASDAQ: SMCI), NVIDIA Corp. (NASDAQ: NVDA) and Advanced Micro Devices Inc. (NASDAQ: AMD) climbed during the Monday pre-market trading session as the Trump administration offered a tariff reprieve to the tech industry.

data.title: Nvidia-Backed Recursion, Ginkgo Bioworks Rally Following FDA's Decision To End Animal Testing
data.description: FDA announces plan to end mandatory animal testing of new drugs, replacing it with more effective and human relevant methods.

data.title: Crypto Czar David Sacks Reveals Three Must-Read Books On The U.S.-China Tariff Dispute Alongside A 'Bonus' Read
data.description: David Sacks, the South African-American tech investor best known for his role in shaping startups like PayPal has highlighted four books he deems vital for making sense of global tensions, particularly amid escalating U.S. tariff disputes and rivalry with China.

data.title: Speaker Mike Johnson Says Government Must 'Eliminate People On Medicaid' Who Are 'Not Actually Eligible To Be There'
data.description: Speaker Johnson wants ineligible recipients removed from Medicaid to safeguard resources for qualified individuals.
